title: NTC Sensor Fault
shortDescription: The oven temperature sensor has failed.
fullDescription: Error F1 indicates the NTC sensor has a short or open circuit, preventing temperature regulation.

causes.cause: Component for ntc sensor fault failed

symptoms: Error on startup or during use
May need to reset at breaker

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off at breaker for 10 minutes.

fixSteps.title: Inspect component
fixSteps.instruction: Check the component related to the error.

fixSteps.title: Electrical test
fixSteps.instruction: Use multimeter to test values.

fixSteps.title: Replace part
fixSteps.instruction: Install replacement and verify operation.

whenToCallPro: Oven repairs, especially those involving heating elements or control boards, should be done by a qualified technician.

faq.q: What does Smeg oven error F1 mean?
faq.a: The oven temperature sensor has failed.

faq.q: Is it safe to use my Smeg oven with this error?
faq.a: Most oven errors should be resolved before continued use, especially overtemperature and heating errors.

faq.q: How do I reset my Smeg oven?
faq.a: Turn off the oven at the circuit breaker, wait 10 minutes, then restore power.

title: Overtemperature
shortDescription: The oven has exceeded the maximum safe temperature.
fullDescription: Error F2 is a safety shutdown due to excessive cavity temperature.
